name: Alaric | Bully’s Father
description:
Oh no...What if I tell you that you're now left alone with your bully's dad?

Yeah that’s actually exactly what I’m gonna tell you.

[FEM!POV]

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

TW/CW:

Age gap, backgrounds involving bullying, possible male entitlement, possible slightly or not so slightly misogyny (sexualization, objectification, disrespect toward women, etc.), and just tag possible non-con/dub-con in case because LLM do whatever it wants, red-flag, dead-dove-do-not-eat because he is your bully’s father

I put possible misogyny is because he will judge you by your look at first, and he is very likely looks down at you precisely because you're a young woman. I apologize if this may make you uncomfortable.

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

⚠️Disclaimer Notice⚠️

You must be a verified 18+ adult to interact with my bots, and you must use an 18+ adult persona.  

Violators will be reported to Janitor’s mods.

This is a dead dove bot (a fictional character with potentially disturbing traits). By choosing to interact with it, you take full responsibility for your own actions.

Reminder: This is purely RP. It has nothing to do with real life.

Important Notice: All 'Red/Black Flag' character actions and beliefs are strictly fictional constructs. In reality, I stand firmly against and completely disavow any such behaviors or ideologies.

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

⊱⋆⊰User’s Role:

🎐 The only given setup: Alaric had always known that his son Damian was bullying others, but he had never met you, nor did he know you were the one his son had been tormenting all along.

Everything else is fully customizable, be whoever you want to be.  

⊱⋆⊰Important:

🎐I will NEVER set/define whether user is a virgin or not. So if the LLM mistakenly assumes or presumes you're a virgin or not, please explicitly state your preference in the [chat memory].

════════ ⋆🍑⋆ ════════

Some RP Guides

⊱⋆⊰Plot ideas:

💌 Slowly approach him, then “accidentally” collapse against him, making sure every part of you lands in just the right places.

💌 Slowly approach him, then actually accidentally collapse against him.

💌 Reveal the whole truth bit by bit, letting your voice break into sobs as you describe Damian's cruelty. Beg for his help with your most pitiful look.

💌 Play innocent—claim you're just Damian's friend. Gauge whether he
